'''rathawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pseudoadaptation|pseudoadaptation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-th-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pseudoadaptation|pseudoadaptation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| rathawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræthæwæth|ræthæwæth]] || [[word:ræthæwæj|ræthæwæj]] || [[word:ræthæwæsh|ræthæwæsh]] || [[word:ræthæwæ|ræthæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rathathawath|rathathawath]] || [[word:rathathawaj|rathathawaj]] || [[word:rathathawash|rathathawash]] || [[word:rathathawa|rathathawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rathawath|rathawath]] || [[word:rathawaj|rathawaj]] || [[word:rathawash|rathawash]] || [[word:rathawa|rathawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rathafwafth|rathafwafth]] || [[word:rathafwafj|rathafwafj]] || [[word:rathafwafsh|rathafwafsh]] || [[word:rathafwaf|rathafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rathawatha|rathawatha]] || [[word:rathawaja|rathawaja]] || [[word:rathawasha|rathawasha]] || [[word:rathawaka|rathawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rathawath|rathawath]] || [[word:rathawaj|rathawaj]] || [[word:rathawash|rathawash]] || [[word:rathawa|rathawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rathawathal|rathawathal]] || [[word:rathawajal|rathawajal]] || [[word:rathawashal|rathawashal]] || [[word:rathawakal|rathawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rathawaathatha|rathawaathatha]] || [[word:rathawaajaja|rathawaajaja]] || [[word:rathawaashasha|rathawaashasha]] || [[word:rathawaaka|rathawaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rathawathan|rathawathan]] || [[word:rathawajan|rathawajan]] || [[word:rathawashan|rathawashan]] || [[word:rathawakan|rathawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rathawathaoro|rathawathaoro]] || [[word:rathawajaoro|rathawajaoro]] || [[word:rathawashaoro|rathawashaoro]] || [[word:rathawakaoro|rathawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|effa290}}
